Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela

package org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela
  • Class
    Description
    AST
    VeLa: VStar expression Language Abstract Syntax Tree class
    EmptyVeLaEnvironment
    A VeLa environment that is backed by nothing, i.e.
    ExpressionVisitor
    VeLa: VStar expression Language interpreter Expression parse tree visitor that generates an Abstract Syntax Tree.
    FunctionExecutor
    The base class for all function executors.
    JavaMethodExecutor
    This class executes Java methods.
    Operand
    VeLa: VStar expression Language A class that represents typed operands.
    Operation
    VeLa: VStar expression Language Operations abstracted from concrete syntax.
    Type
    VeLa: VStar expression Language An enumeration of operand types.
    UserDefinedFunctionExecutor
    This class executes user defined functions.
    VeLaBaseListener
    This class provides an empty implementation of VeLaListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
    VeLaBaseVisitor<T>
    This class provides an empty implementation of VeLaVisitor, which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
    VeLaEnvironment<T>
    A generic symbol binding and lookup environment implementation, the base class for all VeLa environments.
    VeLaErrorListener
    VeLa: VStar expression Language interpreter Capture errors
    VeLaEvalError
    VeLa: VStar expression Language interpreter This class propagates VeLa expression evaluation error information.
    VeLaInterpreter
    VeLa: VStar expression Language interpreter
    VeLaLexer
     
    VeLaListener
    This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by VeLaParser.
    VeLaParseError
    VeLa: VStar expression Language interpreter This class propagates parse error information.
    VeLaParser
     
    VeLaParser.AdditiveExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.AnonFundefContext
     
    VeLaParser.BindingContext
     
    VeLaParser.BlockContext
     
    VeLaParser.BoolContext
     
    VeLaParser.BooleanExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.ConjunctiveExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.ConsequentContext
     
    VeLaParser.ExclusiveOrExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.ExponentiationExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.ExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.FactorContext
     
    VeLaParser.FormalParameterContext
     
    VeLaParser.FuncallContext
     
    VeLaParser.IfExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.IntegerContext
     
    VeLaParser.ListContext
     
    VeLaParser.LogicalNegationExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.MultiplicativeExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.NamedFundefContext
     
    VeLaParser.RealContext
     
    VeLaParser.RelationalExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.SelectionExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.SequenceContext
     
    VeLaParser.ShiftExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.StringContext
     
    VeLaParser.SymbolContext
     
    VeLaParser.TypeContext
     
    VeLaParser.UnaryExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.WhenExpressionContext
     
    VeLaParser.WhileLoopContext
     
    VeLaPrefs
    VeLa preferences class.
    VeLaScope
    This class represents a VeLa scope assumed to exist within a stack of scopes, with a global scope at the bottom and function scopes thereafter.
    VeLaScriptDriver
    This class allows a VeLa program to be run from the command-line or for its LISP or DOT AST to be sent to standard output.
    VeLaStandardLibrary
     
    VeLaValidObservationEnvironment
    A VeLa environment that is backed by a ValidObservation instance.
    VeLaVisitor<T>
    This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by VeLaParser.
